commit.message:
Fix activate/deactivate staff buttons not working on mobile

**Problem:**
- Activate/Deactivate buttons work on desktop but not on mobile devices
- Mobile browsers have 300ms tap delay and touch event handling issues
- Buttons were unresponsive to taps on mobile

**Solution:**
Added mobile-optimized CSS properties to button:
- `touchAction: 'manipulation'` - Removes 300ms tap delay on mobile
- `WebkitTapHighlightColor: 'transparent'` - Removes default tap highlight

**How it works:**
- `touch-action: manipulation` tells mobile browsers to immediately fire
  click events without waiting to detect double-tap gestures
- This eliminates the frustrating delay users experience on mobile

**Impact:**
✅ Buttons now respond instantly to taps on mobile
✅ Desktop functionality unchanged
✅ Better mobile UX for staff management

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

fix(docker): disable Poetry virtualenv so packages are visible to system Python (#108)

## Problem
`docker compose up` fails immediately with `ModuleNotFoundError: No
module named 'binance'`.
Poetry creates a virtualenv by default. Inside Docker, the container
command runs bare
`python buibui.py`, which uses the system Python — it cannot see
packages installed into
  the Poetry virtualenv, so all dependencies are effectively invisible.

  ## Fix
Add `poetry config virtualenvs.create false` before `poetry install` in
the Dockerfile.
This installs packages directly into the system Python, which is the
correct pattern
  for Docker + Poetry.

Also adds `--without dev` to exclude dev dependencies from the
production image
  (aligns with PR #103).

  ## Test plan
  - [ ] `docker compose up` starts without ModuleNotFoundError
- [ ] Both `price-monitor` and `position-monitor` services boot
successfully
